title: viola betonicifolia subsp. betonicifolia
intro: Viola betonicifolia subsp. betonicifolia, also known as Himalayan violet or Kashmir violet, is a perennial plant species native to the Himalayas and parts of India. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Viola betonicifolia subsp. betonicifolia include relief from colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of fever and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
